description: ICE detainee card. The right side is a desaturated black-and-white close-up portrait of a man (Jose Roberto Rodriguez-Urbina) wearing a dark knit beanie, looking directly at the camera, photographed against a wall with a posted notice in an interior setting. The left side is a dark overlay with typography: a large light-blue or cyan serif all-caps headline 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL', a white subhead '1/22/2025 | New York, NY', the name 'Jose Roberto Rodriguez-Urbina' in bold white sans-serif, then a 'CRIME:' label with a single bullet 'Overstaying terms of Admission to the U.S.'. The DHS/ICE seal and 'ICE' wordmark appear at lower left. A red diagonal corner banner reads 'NEW YORK FIELD OFFICE'.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 1/22/2025 | New York, NY; Jose Roberto Rodriguez-Urbina; CRIME: Overstaying terms of Admission to the U.S.; ICE; NEW YORK FIELD OFFICE
